items.title: Quantitative Linear Logic for Neuro-Symbolic Learning and Verification
items.summary: Differentiable Logics are deployed in neuro-symbolic learning tasks as a way of embedding logical constraints in the training objective of neural networks. items.title: Reachable-Set Decomposition for Real-Time Aggregation of Multi-Zone HVAC Fleets
items.summary: Aggregating building heating, ventilation, and air-conditioning (HVAC) fleets provides substantial real-time flexibility to power system operations. items.title: Unlocking Patch-Level Features for CLIP-Based Class-Incremental Learning
items.summary: Class-Incremental Learning (CIL) enables models to continuously integrate new knowledge while mitigating catastrophic forgetting. items.title: QLAM: A Quantum Long-Attention Memory Approach to Long-Sequence Token Modeling
items.summary: Modeling long-range dependencies in sequential data remains a central challenge in machine learning. Transformers address this challenge through attention mechanisms, but their quadratic complexity with respect to sequence length limits scalability to long contexts. items.title: Combining moment matrices, symmetric extension, and Lovász theta: $Φ_{\text{E8}}$ is entangled
items.summary: We solve an open problem in entanglement theory posed by Yu et al., {\it Nature Communications 12, 1012 (2021)}. items.title: Training Long-Context Vision-Language Models Effectively with Generalization Beyond 128K Context
items.summary: Long-context modeling is becoming a core capability of modern large vision-language models (LVLMs), enabling sustained context management across long-document understanding, video analysis, and multi-turn tool use in agentic workflows. items.title: Graphs of Hecke operators in mixed ramification
items.summary: We study Hecke operators on moduli spaces of ramified $G$-bundles using the combinatorial language of Hecke graphs. items.title: Stability analysis of Richardson models with delay for confrontation between two countries
items.summary: This article proposes a non-autonomous mathematical model with delay for confrontation between two countries, and examines the stability of its equilibrium state. Our criteria for stability take into account the influence of the factor of hostility between countries. For the autonomous case, the asy

items.title: Harnessing Agentic Evolution
items.summary: Agentic evolution has emerged as a powerful paradigm for improving programs, workflows, and scientific solutions by iteratively generating candidates, evaluating them, and using feedback to guide future search. items.title: OmniLiDAR: A Unified Diffusion Framework for Multi-Domain 3D LiDAR Generation
items.summary: LiDAR scene generation is increasingly important for scalable simulation and synthetic data creation, especially under diverse sensing conditions that are costly to capture at scale. items.title: Emergency Vehicle Preemption Strategies using Machine Learning to Optimize Traffic Operations
items.summary: Emergency response vehicles (ERVs), such as fire trucks, operate to save lives and mitigate property damage. items.title: Photometric metallicity of Galactic RR Lyrae stars in the Gaia DR3 era
items.summary: We present a new, calibrated $G$-band relationship between pulsation period $P$, Fourier parameter $φ_{31}$, and metallicity [Fe/H] for galactic RR Lyrae stars from the Gaia survey. items.title: Min-Max Optimization Requires Exponentially Many Queries
items.summary: We study the query complexity of min-max optimization of a nonconvex-nonconcave function $f$ over $[0,1]^d \times [0,1]^d$. items.title: Tidal disruption of a low-mass star in an active galactic nucleus as the origin of the PS16dtm outburst
items.summary: The event PS16dtm, which occured in the center of the Narrow Line Seyfert 1 (NLS1) galaxy SDSS J015804.75-005221.8 (z = 0.080440), is one of the few candidates for a tidal disruption event in an already-acretting active galactic nucleus (AGN). items.title: VoxCor: Training-Free Volumetric Features for Multimodal Voxel Correspondence
